name_en: 【Top Quality Replica】🌹🎉(Small 32CM) New Tote Bag🎉1BG538 is here🎉🎉 This tote bag features a structured silhouette, exuding a modern and elegant charm. Generous capacity with a convenient large opening, soft-grain leather outlines stylish and minimalist lines. This practical accessory blends simple yet exquisite details, a vivid expression of the brand's master craftsmanship. Adorned with sparkling metal hardware and an elegant letter logo, highlighting the bag's refined and minimalist beauty. Grab yours now🎉🎉 Dimensions: L32 x H23.5 x W16cm🎉🎉🎉👏!
